setup: 20,000 v 20,000 Infantry, NO heroes, OPEN-FIELD ENCAMPMENT (no alliance = no garrison research bonus), ran x3 IDENTICAL. DETERMINISTIC (no procs). Exact-fit Type-1 target.
troop_tier_display: Lv 1.0 (per report Troop Power Comparison). NOTE: earlier record said 'T10' - that was WRONG; the report shows Lv 1.0. Reconcile before fitting.
KEY_FINDING: NOT a true stat-mirror. Combat class = Infantry: attacker has +16.0pt Defense (169.0 vs 153.0), +1.9 Attack, +0.6 Health; defender +2.3 Lethality. The attacker's real stat advantage (esp. Defense) explains the 24.2% attacker survival / 0% defender - NO attacker ROLE advantage needed => def_k is a pure fudge. PHASE 1 EXACT-FIT TARGET: reproduce attacker 24.2% (4837) & defender 0% from THESE stats with def_k=1.0, no fudge.
engine_history: When these stats were MISSING (blind/assumed-equal) + def_k=0.45, the engine gave 53-57% survivors vs real 24.2%. The misfit was the missing stats, not the engine.
_extraction: CONFIRMED by Martin 2026-07-08; STATS captured 2026-07-09 (were missing before - the OCR gap).
